SEQUENCE.COMMENT: Framework_Core_listFiles - get a list of files from a local folder or the folder of another environment (DEV/TEST/PROD)
Note that this service NO LONGER uses an output template
in order to alter the format of the IDATA structure that is returned from all flow service calls, and if you are invoking this
service using an http call, you can choose json as the return format using the Accept http parameter:

MAP.COMMENT: message = unable to list tokenStatus = valid

BRANCH.COMMENT: depending on where the caller wants the file from...

SEQUENCE.NAME: environment==uienvironselection || clusterName == uienvironselection
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: get the list of files from the local server

BRANCH.COMMENT: if no files are found, then return 'No content available'

SEQUENCE.NAME: $default
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: get the list of files from a remote server

BRANCH.COMMENT: Chooses the location to go to based on the CLUSTER_NAME
